description: R&D research tier invocations (in-progress, completed). 20 independent tiers, repeatable — same tier can be started multiple times. Tiers 1-10: standard R&D. Tiers 11-20: frontier moonshots (higher cost, longer timelines, more variance, better quality/$).

columns.project_id: TEXT PRIMARY KEY — Unique invocation ID (e.g., "t1_1", "t1_2", "t3_1")
columns.started_day: INTEGER — Day this invocation was started
columns.expected_completion_day: INTEGER — Expected completion day (sampled from Normal distribution)
columns.expected_quality_boost: REAL — Sampled quality boost to be applied on completion
columns.quality_boost_applied: REAL — Actual quality boost applied on completion
